steps.name: Hosting config
steps.description: Create firebase.json and .firebaserc at repo root. firebase.json declares hosting.public = 'web/dist' and a SPA rewrite mapping '**' to '/index.html'. .firebaserc sets projects.default = 'grocery-list-cad'. Satisfies US-01.
steps.criteria: All tests in describe 'US-01: hosting config' go GREEN (3 tests).
acceptance_criteria: firebase.json has a rewrite rule with source '**' and destination '/index.html'
All 3 tests in describe 'US-01: hosting config' in walking-skeleton.test.ts pass

steps.name: Deploy workflow
steps.description: Create .github/workflows/deploy-web.yml per the verbatim spec in docs/feature/web-prod-deploy/devops/ci-cd-pipeline.md. Workflow chains off ci.yml via workflow_run on conclusion=success, branches=[main], pins checkout to head_sha, runs npm ci + npm run build in /web, deploys via FirebaseExtended/action-hosting-deploy@v0 to project grocery-list-cad channel live with FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT secret. Concurrency group deploy-web with cancel-in-progress=false. Satisfies US-02 + secret reference portion of US-03.
steps.criteria: All tests in describe 'US-02: deploy-web.yml workflow' go GREEN (6 tests); ci.yml invariant stays GREEN.
acceptance_criteria: Deploy job if clause contains conclusion == 'success'
Deploy step uses FirebaseExtended/action-hosting-deploy action with projectId='grocery-list-cad', channelId='live', firebaseServiceAccount referencing FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT secret
npm ci and npm run build steps run in working-directory 'web', both before the deploy step
ci.yml remains untouched (invariant test stays GREEN)

steps.name: Deploy docs and README
steps.description: Create docs/deploy.md (prod URL, deploy trigger, rollback command, manual fallback, service-account rotation) and add a Deployment section to README.md linking to docs/deploy.md. Satisfies US-04 and docs portion of US-03.
steps.criteria: All 7 tests in milestone-1-docs.test.ts go GREEN.
acceptance_criteria: docs/deploy.md mentions 'firebase deploy --only hosting' and 'npm run build'
docs/deploy.md mentions FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT and describes key rotation/revocation procedure
README.md has a top-level Deployment section heading and a markdown link to docs/deploy.md

validation.notes: Reviewer dispatch skipped per user autonomy preference for this tight, infra-only feature (5 files, all specs pre-existing in DISTILL + DEVOPS). Quality gate is the acceptance test suite (17 tests, 16 RED -> GREEN, 1 invariant GREEN -> GREEN).
